title: pleurospermum kingdon-wardii
intro: Pleurospermum kingdon-wardii, also known as the Kingdon-Ward's pepperwort, is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve gastrointestinal issues due to its high content of essential oils, including apiol and myristicin. The health benefits of Pleurospermum kingdon-wardii include relief from flatulence, indigestion, and nausea, as well as its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Pleurospermum kingdon-wardii, such as essential oils and infusions, are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders.
